description:
Recto: draft of a legal query to the Nagid regarding a man who has been sick for one year. Followed by a draft of a different legal query underneath.

Verso: drafts or jottings in Arabic script, mentioning quantities. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
